mapper.select: SELECT r.room_id AS roomId, r.room_name AS roomName, r.game_kind AS gameKind, r.room_status AS roomStatus, r.started_date AS startedDate, r.end_date AS endDate, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.created_id AS createdId, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, r.updated_id AS updatedId FROM room r INNER JOIN room_users ru ON r.room_id = ru.room_id WHERE ru.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.room_id
